user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Patagonia
Product type: Nano Puff outdoor jacket
Tone: adventurous, authentic, sustainable
Visual style: Clean, natural outdoor settings with vibrant yet earthy colors highlighting the jacket's lightweight and eco-friendly features.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Puff, Don't Fluff: The Eco-Warrior's Warm Hug
brief.caption: An ultra-lightweight Nano Puff jacket floats down from a clear blue sky, landing gently on a rugged mountain hiker, seamlessly blending with the landscape of evergreen trees and rocky cliffs, emphasizing its sustainable insulation.
brief.visual_style: Clean, natural outdoor settings with vibrant yet earthy colors highlighting the jacket's lightweight and eco-friendly features.
brief.typography_style: Bold, condensed sans-serif with a rugged texture, evoking outdoor resilience
brief.color_scheme: Patagonia's signature deep blues, forest greens, and earth browns
